fields.definition_en: A place in the ground where a dead body is buried; or (of situations, feelings, or people) seriously bad or important.
fields.example_en: The situation is a matter of grave concern.
fields.example_vi: Tình hình là một vấn đề đáng lo ngại nghiêm trọng.
fields.mnemonic: A situation so bad it could put you in a grave.

fields.definition_en: The force that attracts objects towards one another, especially the force that makes things fall to the ground; or the seriousness of a situation.
fields.example_en: I don't think you understand the gravity of the situation.
fields.example_vi: Tôi không nghĩ bạn hiểu được mức độ nghiêm trọng của tình hình.
fields.mnemonic: Gravity pulls things down; a grave situation weighs you down.

fields.definition_en: A pattern or structure made from horizontal and vertical lines crossing each other to form squares; or a system of wires through which electricity is connected to different power stations.
fields.example_en: The city's power grid was damaged in the storm.
fields.example_vi: Mạng lưới điện của thành phố đã bị hư hại trong cơn bão.
fields.mnemonic: A grid is like a net of straight lines.

fields.meaning_vi: nỗi đau buồn (thường do mất mát)
fields.definition_en: Very great sadness, especially at the death of someone.
fields.example_en: She was overcome with grief when her husband died.
fields.example_vi: Cô ấy chìm ngập trong nỗi đau buồn khi chồng qua đời.
fields.mnemonic: Grief makes you weep.

fields.definition_en: To smile a wide smile.
fields.example_en: He grinned widely when he saw the presents.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy cười toe toét khi nhìn thấy những món quà.
fields.mnemonic: A big smile that shows your teeth.

fields.definition_en: To make something into small pieces or a powder by pressing between hard surfaces.
fields.example_en: Shall I grind a little black pepper over your salad?
fields.example_vi: Tôi xay một chút hạt tiêu đen lên món salad của bạn nhé?
fields.mnemonic: You grind coffee beans to make coffee.

fields.meaning_vi: sự nắm chặt, sự hiểu biết
fields.definition_en: Control over something or someone; or a tight hold on something.
fields.example_en: He has a good grip on the subject.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy có sự hiểu biết tốt về chủ đề này.
fields.mnemonic: To grip something is to hold it tightly.

fields.definition_en: (in) total; or extremely unpleasant.
fields.example_en: Gross domestic product (GDP) is a measure of economic activity.
fields.example_vi: Tổng sản phẩm quốc nội (GDP) là một thước đo hoạt động kinh tế.
fields.mnemonic: Gross income is your total income before taxes. Also means yuck!

fields.definition_en: A member of an unofficial military group that is trying to change the government by making sudden, unexpected attacks on the official army forces.
fields.example_en: Guerrilla fighters attacked the military convoy.
fields.example_vi: Lực lượng du kích đã tấn công đoàn xe quân sự.
fields.mnemonic: Sounds like 'gorilla', who fights hiding in the jungle.

fields.definition_en: Help and advice about how to do something or about how to deal with problems connected with your work, education, or personal relationships.
fields.example_en: I'm looking forward to working under your expert guidance.
fields.example_vi: Tôi mong được làm việc dưới sự hướng dẫn chuyên môn của bạn.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of guide.

fields.meaning_vi: cảm giác tội lỗi, tội lỗi
fields.definition_en: A feeling of worry or unhappiness that you have because you have done something wrong, such as causing harm to another person.
fields.example_en: He suffered from feelings of guilt.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta đau khổ vì cảm giác tội lỗi.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of guilty.

fields.definition_en: The long tube in the body of a person or animal, through which food moves during the process of digesting food; or a strong belief about someone or something that cannot completely be explained.
fields.example_en: I have a gut feeling that something is wrong.
fields.example_vi: Tôi có linh cảm rằng có điều gì đó không ổn.
fields.mnemonic: Your gut is your stomach/intestines. A 'gut feeling' comes from inside you.

fields.definition_en: To call someone in order to attract their attention; or to publicly praise or show approval for a person or an achievement.
fields.example_en: The new treatment has been hailed as a miracle.
fields.example_vi: Phương pháp điều trị mới đã được ca ngợi như một phép màu.
fields.mnemonic: You hail a taxi by waving your arm.

fields.definition_en: In the middle of something, or at a place that is equally far from two other places.
fields.example_en: New York is halfway between Boston and Washington.
fields.example_vi: New York nằm ở nửa đường giữa Boston và Washington.
fields.mnemonic: Half of the way.

fields.definition_en: To (cause to) stop moving or doing something or happening.
fields.example_en: Production has halted at all of the company's factories.
fields.example_vi: Hoạt động sản xuất đã tạm dừng tại tất cả các nhà máy của công ty.
fields.mnemonic: HALT! (Stop!)

fields.definition_en: An amount of something that can be held in one hand; or a small number of people or things.
fields.example_en: Only a handful of people came to the meeting.
fields.example_vi: Chỉ có một số ít người đến dự cuộc họp.
fields.mnemonic: What fits in a FULL HAND.

fields.meaning_vi: sự xử lý, cách giải quyết
fields.definition_en: The way that someone deals with a situation or person.
fields.example_en: His handling of the crisis was widely criticized.
fields.example_vi: Cách giải quyết khủng hoảng của ông ấy đã bị chỉ trích rộng rãi.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of handle.

fields.definition_en: Useful or convenient; or near and easy to reach.
fields.example_en: This little tool is very handy for fixing bikes.
fields.example_vi: Dụng cụ nhỏ này rất tiện dụng để sửa xe đạp.
fields.mnemonic: Something handy is good to have in your HAND.

fields.definition_en: Behaviour that annoys or upsets someone.
fields.example_en: She claimed she suffered sexual harassment at work.
fields.example_vi: Cô ấy cho rằng mình đã bị quấy rối tình dục tại nơi làm việc.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of harass.

fields.definition_en: The physical and electronic parts of a computer, rather than the instructions it follows.
fields.example_en: You need to upgrade your computer's hardware to play this game.
fields.example_vi: Bạn cần nâng cấp phần cứng máy tính của mình để chơi trò chơi này.
fields.mnemonic: The HARD parts of a computer (screen, keyboard) as opposed to the soft parts (programs).

fields.definition_en: A situation in which people are peaceful and agree with each other, or when things seem right or suitable together.
fields.example_en: We must learn to live in harmony with nature.
fields.example_vi: Chúng ta phải học cách sống hài hòa với thiên nhiên.
fields.mnemonic: Singing in harmony means the voices blend well.

fields.definition_en: Unpleasant, unkind, cruel, or more severe than is necessary.
fields.example_en: The punishment was too harsh for the crime.
fields.example_vi: Hình phạt quá khắc nghiệt đối với tội danh.
fields.mnemonic: A harsh sound hurts your ears.

fields.definition_en: The time of year when crops are cut and collected from the fields, or the activity of cutting and collecting them, or the crops that are cut and collected.
fields.example_en: We had a good wheat harvest this year.
fields.example_vi: Năm nay chúng tôi có một vụ thu hoạch lúa mì tốt.
fields.mnemonic: Harvest Moon.

fields.definition_en: An extremely strong feeling of dislike.
fields.example_en: He looked at me with pure hatred.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta nhìn tôi với lòng căm thù thuần túy.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of hate.

fields.definition_en: To cause repeated suffering or anxiety.
fields.example_en: The memory of that day still haunts me.
fields.example_vi: Ký ức về ngày hôm đó vẫn còn ám ảnh tôi.
fields.mnemonic: Ghosts haunt haunted houses.

fields.definition_en: Something that is dangerous and likely to cause damage.
fields.example_en: Smoking is a serious health hazard.
fields.example_vi: Hút thuốc là một mối nguy hiểm sức khỏe nghiêm trọng.
fields.mnemonic: Biohazard symbol warns of biological hazards.

fields.definition_en: To increase or make something increase, especially an emotion or effect.
fields.example_en: The tense music heightened the feeling of suspense.
fields.example_vi: Âm nhạc căng thẳng đã làm tăng thêm cảm giác hồi hộp.
fields.mnemonic: Height + en -> to make higher.

fields.definition_en: Features belonging to the culture of a particular society, such as traditions, languages, or buildings, that were created in the past and still have historical importance.
fields.example_en: We must preserve our national heritage.
fields.example_vi: Chúng ta phải bảo tồn di sản quốc gia của mình.
fields.mnemonic: What you inherit from the past is your heritage.

fields.definition_en: A system in which people or things are arranged according to their importance.
fields.example_en: The military has a rigid hierarchy.
fields.example_vi: Quân đội có một hệ thống cấp bậc cứng nhắc.
fields.mnemonic: Higher-archy. A system showing who is higher than who.

fields.meaning_vi: nổi tiếng, thu hút nhiều sự chú ý
fields.definition_en: Attracting a lot of attention and interest from the public and newspapers, television, etc.
fields.example_en: He resigned after a high-profile scandal.
fields.example_vi: Ông ấy đã từ chức sau một vụ bê bối thu hút nhiều sự chú ý.
fields.mnemonic: A profile that is held high for everyone to see.

fields.definition_en: Something that you say or do that shows what you think or want, usually in a way that is not direct.
fields.example_en: He dropped a few hints about his upcoming resignation.
fields.example_vi: Ông ấy đã đưa ra một vài gợi ý về việc từ chức sắp tới của mình.
fields.mnemonic: A small clue.

fields.definition_en: The country you were born in.
fields.example_en: Many refugees dream of returning to their homeland.
fields.example_vi: Nhiều người tị nạn mơ ước được trở về quê hương của họ.
fields.mnemonic: The land that is your home.

fields.meaning_vi: mắc vào, móc vào, thu hút
fields.definition_en: To fasten something with a hook, hang something on a hook, or catch something with a hook; or to attract someone's attention.
fields.example_en: The show hooked me from the very first episode.
fields.example_vi: Chương trình đã thu hút tôi ngay từ tập đầu tiên.
fields.mnemonic: A fish gets caught on a hook.

fields.definition_en: Having hope.
fields.example_en: She is hopeful that she will get the job.
fields.example_vi: Cô ấy đầy hy vọng rằng mình sẽ nhận được công việc.
fields.mnemonic: Full of hope.

fields.definition_en: The line at the farthest place that you can see, where the sky seems to touch the land or sea.
fields.example_en: The sun sank below the horizon.
fields.example_vi: Mặt trời lặn xuống dưới đường chân trời.
fields.mnemonic: A horizontal line in the distance.

fields.definition_en: A hard, pointed, often curved part that grows from the top of the head of some animals; or a device on a vehicle that is used to make a loud noise.
fields.example_en: The driver honked his horn at the pedestrian.
fields.example_vi: Người lái xe bóp còi với người đi bộ.
fields.mnemonic: Rhinos have horns.

fields.definition_en: Someone who is taken as a prisoner by an enemy in order to force the other people involved to do what the enemy wants.
fields.example_en: The terrorists took several hostages.
fields.example_vi: Bọn khủng bố đã bắt một vài con tin.
fields.mnemonic: A person held HOSTILEly is a HOSTAGE.

fields.definition_en: Unfriendly and not liking something.
fields.example_en: The president faced a hostile crowd.
fields.example_vi: Tổng thống phải đối mặt với một đám đông thù địch.
fields.mnemonic: Someone acting like a host's enemy is hostile.

fields.definition_en: An occasion when someone is unfriendly or shows that they do not like something.
fields.example_en: There is a lot of hostility between the two rival groups.
fields.example_vi: Có rất nhiều sự thù địch giữa hai nhóm đối thủ.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of hostile.

fields.definition_en: Involved in or connected with improving people's lives and reducing suffering.
fields.example_en: The UN is providing humanitarian aid to the war zone.
fields.example_vi: Liên Hợp Quốc đang cung cấp viện trợ nhân đạo cho vùng chiến sự.
fields.mnemonic: Caring for humans.

fields.definition_en: People in general; or understanding and kindness towards other people.
fields.example_en: The crime was a crime against humanity.
fields.example_vi: Tội ác đó là một tội ác chống lại nhân loại.
fields.mnemonic: All human beings collectively.

fields.definition_en: Not proud or not believing that you are important.
fields.example_en: Despite his success, he remains a very humble man.
fields.example_vi: Mặc dù thành công, ông ấy vẫn là một người rất khiêm tốn.
fields.mnemonic: Be humble, sit down.

fields.definition_en: A chemical element that is the lightest gas, has no colour, taste, or smell, and combines with oxygen to form water.
fields.example_en: Hydrogen is a potential source of clean energy.
fields.example_vi: Hydro là một nguồn năng lượng sạch tiềm năng.
fields.mnemonic: H2O is two parts Hydrogen, one part Oxygen.

fields.meaning_vi: giấy tờ tùy thân, sự nhận dạng
fields.definition_en: An official document that shows or proves who you are; or the act of recognizing and naming someone or something.
fields.example_en: Please show some form of identification.
fields.example_vi: Vui lòng xuất trình một số loại giấy tờ tùy thân.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of identify. ID stands for identification.

fields.definition_en: Based on or relating to a particular set of ideas or beliefs.
fields.example_en: There are deep ideological differences between the two parties.
fields.example_vi: Có những khác biệt sâu sắc về hệ tư tưởng giữa hai đảng.
fields.mnemonic: Adjective form of ideology.

fields.definition_en: A set of beliefs or principles, especially one on which a political system, party, or organization is based.
fields.example_en: The party is united by a common ideology.
fields.example_vi: Đảng được đoàn kết bởi một hệ tư tưởng chung.
fields.mnemonic: Idea + ology (study of) -> The study/system of ideas.

fields.definition_en: A stupid person or someone who is behaving in a stupid way.
fields.example_en: Don't be such an idiot!
fields.example_vi: Đừng ngốc như vậy!
fields.mnemonic: If you act like an IDIOT, you do stupid things.

fields.meaning_vi: sự thiếu hiểu biết, sự ngu dốt
fields.definition_en: Lack of knowledge, understanding, or information about something.
fields.example_en: Public ignorance about the disease is still a cause for concern.
fields.example_vi: Sự thiếu hiểu biết của công chúng về căn bệnh này vẫn là một nguyên nhân gây lo ngại.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of ignore. If you ignore facts, you have ignorance.

fields.definition_en: The use of words or pictures in books, films, paintings, etc. to describe ideas or situations.
fields.example_en: The poem is full of beautiful nature imagery.
fields.example_vi: Bài thơ tràn đầy những hình ảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp.
fields.mnemonic: Collections of IMAGEs.

fields.definition_en: Extremely large in size or degree.
fields.example_en: They spent an immense amount of time and money on the project.
fields.example_vi: Họ đã dành một lượng thời gian và tiền bạc to lớn cho dự án.
fields.mnemonic: Im (not) + mense (measurable). Too big to be measured.
